# Well Stimulation

**Summary**: Techniques used to increase the flow of oil or gas from a well.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-abdallah|Abdallah, 2024]] evaluated well stimulation techniques including hydraulic fracturing and thermochemical treatment.

## Key Subtopics

- [[2024-abdallah|Abdallah, 2024]] ['fracture cleanup', 'chemical flooding']

## Methods and Approaches Used

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Thermochemical fluids provide both heat and nitrogen, which can enhance cleanup after fracking. ([[2024-abdallah|Abdallah, 2024, p. 43]])

## Competing Approaches and Debates

- [[2024-abdallah|Abdallah, 2024]] Ensuring effective removal of treatment chemicals and fluids from the near-wellbore area.
